summary: Iteration 13 - Multi-part update testing complete. All features working: role-based project filtering, contractor role, project_lead_id/google_drive_url fields, dashboard status grouping, AI settings restriction.

Super admin sees all 14-15 projects on dashboard
Resource user (henry) sees only 2 allocated projects (Website Redesign, FX1 - AI Auditing Module)
Dashboard shows projects grouped by status: Active (with count badge), Pipeline, Completed sections

Settings page shows AI Configuration section for super_admin only

Settings/Reports/Users links hidden from resource user sidebar
Projects page create/edit dialog has Project Lead dropdown (required field)
Projects page create/edit dialog has Google Drive Folder URL field (optional)
Users page role dropdown includes Contractor option
Backend: GET /api/projects returns project_lead_name and google_drive_url fields
Backend: PUT /api/settings/ai returns 403 for resource user
Backend: GET /api/settings/ai returns 403 for resource user
Backend: Resource user GET /api/projects returns only allocated projects

Henry's password was changed to 'Welcome123!New' during testing.
